name: Pico Jano – circular desde Lanchares por el embalse de Alsa
region_intro: Mountain biking around Campoo De Yuso offers diverse terrain set against the dramatic natural features of southern Cantabria. The region is characterized by high-altitude mountainous landscapes, extensive oak forests, and the prominent Ebro Reservoir, often referred to as "the sea of Campoo." Riders can expect a mix of fast tracks, technical sections, and panoramic trails with continuous views of the reservoir and surrounding peaks. This varied environment provides a challenging experience for mountain bikers. Best mountain bike trails around Campoo De Yuso The most popular mountain bike trail is Pico Jano – circular desde Lanchares por el embalse de Alsa, a 31.6 miles (50.8 km) trail that takes about 5 hours 27 minutes to complete, featuring significant elevation gains and views of the Alsa reservoir. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Monte de Hijedo — circular desde Arija, a difficult 20.8 miles (33.5 km) path. This route winds through varied terrain, including sections of dense forest and open landscapes. Local mountain bikers also love the Palombera Pass – Cruz de Fuentes loop from Reinosa, a 41.4 miles (66.7 km) trail leading through high-altitude mountainous terrain, often completed in about 6 hours 48 minutes. Mountain biking around Campoo De Yuso is defined by the expansive Ebro Reservoir, high-altitude mountain ranges, and extensive oak forests. The network offers options for different ability levels, from moderate to difficult. The routes in Campoo De Yuso are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.8 stars from over 30 reviews. More than 370 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Campoo De Yuso's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are available in Campoo De Yuso?
A: Campoo De Yuso offers a wide selection of mountain bike trails, with over 50 routes available. These range in difficulty from moderate to difficult, ensuring options for various skill levels.

Q: What are the difficulty levels of mountain bike trails in Campoo De Yuso?
A: The trails in Campoo De Yuso cater to a range of abilities. You'll find 5 easy routes, 34 moderate routes, and 12 difficult routes, providing options for both casual riders and experienced mountain bikers seeking a challenge.

Q: What natural features can I expect to see while mountain biking in Campoo De Yuso?
A: Mountain biking in Campoo De Yuso offers continuous views of the expansive &lt;strong&gt;Ebro Reservoir&lt;/strong&gt;, often called "the sea of Campoo," and the surrounding Campurrian peaks. You'll also ride through extensive oak forests and experience high-altitude mountainous terrain. The region is known for its untouched natural beauty and sweeping vistas.

Q: Are there any circular mountain bike routes in Campoo De Yuso?
A: Yes, Campoo De Yuso features several notable circular routes. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/24634660" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cuenca Bucer – Iglesia de Espinilla loop from Reinosa&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate 48.5 km trail, and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38169320" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;El Mediano Frío Viewpoint – Alsa Reservoir loop from La Costana&lt;/a&gt; offers a challenging 40.7 km ride with significant elevation.

Q: What do other mountain bikers say about the trails in Campoo De Yuso?
A: The mountain bike trails in Campoo De Yuso are highly regarded by the komoot community, with an average rating of 4.8 out of 5 stars from over 30 reviews. Riders frequently praise the diverse terrain, the stunning views of the Ebro Reservoir, and the challenging yet rewarding nature of the routes.

Q: What are some interesting landmarks or attractions near the mountain bike trails?
A: Beyond the trails, you can explore several points of interest. Consider visiting the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2573626" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Source of the Ebro River&lt;/a&gt;, the historical &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3672317" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ruins of Julióbriga&lt;/a&gt;, or the scenic &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3268511" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cruz de Fuentes&lt;/a&gt; mountain pass. The region also features charming mountain villages and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5415244" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Historic Center of Reinosa&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Are there any specific viewpoints along the mountain bike routes?
A: Yes, the region is dotted with panoramic viewpoints (miradores). The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38169320" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;El Mediano Frío Viewpoint&lt;/a&gt; is part of a challenging loop from La Costana, offering spectacular vistas. Additionally, the Mirador Ermita de la Virgen de las Nieves is known for its sunrise views over the Ebro Reservoir.

Q: What is the best time of year to go mountain biking in Campoo De Yuso?
A: Campoo De Yuso offers excellent mountain biking opportunities throughout much of the year. The region's high altitude means it can be cooler than coastal areas. Spring and autumn generally provide pleasant temperatures and vibrant landscapes, while summer is also popular, especially for enjoying the Ebro Reservoir.

Q: Are there opportunities for birdwatching near the mountain bike trails?
A: Absolutely. The Ebro Reservoir is a National Refuge for Aquatic Birds, home to over 70 species including the black kite, northern shoveler, and grey heron. An Ornithological Center in Lapoblación provides information for birdwatching enthusiasts, making it a great complementary activity to your ride.

Q: What other activities can I do in Campoo De Yuso besides mountain biking?
A: Campoo De Yuso offers a variety of outdoor activities. You can enjoy hiking on numerous trails, explore charming traditional villages, visit historical sites like the Tower of Los Bustamante, or engage in water sports on the Ebro Reservoir. The Balneario de Corconte also offers mineral-medicinal waters for relaxation.

Q: Are there any easy mountain bike trails suitable for beginners in Campoo De Yuso?
A: While many routes are moderate to difficult, there are 5 easy mountain bike trails available in Campoo De Yuso. These routes provide a gentler introduction to the region's beautiful landscapes, allowing beginners to enjoy the scenery without overly challenging terrain.
tips: A wonderful and very quiet place with a gravel track that runs next to the reservoir that is a real blast!

The geodesic vertex of Pico Jano is located at 1,343 meters above sea level and although reaching it can be a real challenge, the views you will have will be your great reward. With good visibility you can have some beautiful postcards of the Cantabrian interior and the Mediajo reservoir that is located at the foot of the peak.
